text:
🚨 BREAKING: You can now turn Claude into any billionaire coach you want.

Naval for leverage. Hormozi for offers. Bezos for customers.

It adapts its thinking to whoever you choose and applies it to your situation.

Here’s how to activate it: https://t.co/n3J0zJ7gL7

Steal this mega prompt to turn Claude into your personal Billionaire Coach Activator:

Just name the billionaire whose thinking you want applied to your situation —
then describe your business, decision, or problem in plain language.

Watch Claude adopt their exact mental models,

What this prompt does that normal "give me business advice" doesn't:

Most people ask Claude "what should I do about X?" and get a reasonable
answer based on general best practices.

This prompt doesn't give general advice.

It gives you one specific billionaire's advice —

Here's what to run it on:

→ Run Naval on your business model and find out exactly why you're still trading time for money when you should be building leverage

→ Run Hormozi on your offer and find out exactly what's missing from the value equation that's making your price feel

I should charge $99 for each of these.
But every single guide on this page is free.

→ Gemini Mastery Guide
→ Prompt Engineering Guide
→ Claude Mastery Guide
→ OpenAI Mastery Guide
→ + more dropping & updating regularly

Zero cost. Zero catch.

Just open and learn 👇

让AI真正懂你：我做了个"灵魂挖掘"技能😎

"We know more than we can tell."
 我们知道的，远多于我们能表达出来的。

 — Michael Polanyi，《The Tacit Dimension》，1966

前几天刷推的时候，无意间看到了 Michael Polanyi 这段话↑...

然后被深深触动了一下...

为了让 AI https://t.co/l9AlVZUcKG

把Michael Polanyi方法论变成一个技能

然后我就突发奇想，能不能把Michael Polanyi的思想变成一个技能，这样每次我写文章或者开发东西的前期和完成后，都可以使用这个技能来逼出我的真实的想法和答案。

让AI更了解我，更懂我，同时能让它学习我真正的内在需求和知识。 https://t.co/WFIACQjJVO

我给它设计了几种追问方式，都是从Michael Polanyi那些方法论改的：

核心原则只有一条：不问抽象标准，只问具体行为。

我把这些经典方法改造成了四种 AI 追问方式，做成了一个 Claude Code 技能。 https://t.co/e4adbhmPwl

测试了8轮 效果挺好的

它会根据我做过的事情 不断提问我

想办法让我说出我内心真实的想法 https://t.co/PCHvmb9jyl

有时候表达不好

还会想办法逼迫我说 

哈哈哈😅 https://t.co/9JtFthaMKo

技能已经开源了

你们可以根据自己的需求修改

隐性知识挖掘技能，已开源：https://t.co/7B7JBPtpE9

这里还有个详细介绍的文章，感兴趣的可以看看：https://t.co/9hffFKjv7h https://t.co/5aDlqjEs3C
